model_name: UC ED Admission Risk Research Prototype
endpoint: Admission to the same hospital after the UC-related ED encounter (EDevent == 2)
cohort_definition: K51 in any ICD-10-CM diagnosis position
validation_approach: Five-fold internal validation grouped by HOSP_ED
weighting_approach: DISCWT used as sample weight for model fitting and reported validation metrics
intended_use: Investigational local research interface for estimating admission patterns observed among UC-related ED encounters in 2019 NEDS; not for admission or discharge decisions.
limitations: Administrative encounter-level data may reflect billing and coding practices.
Some diagnosis and comorbidity fields may only be finalized after the encounter.
No vital signs, laboratory results, medications, imaging, disease activity, clinician assessment, or treatment response are included.
Admission reflects clinical need and healthcare-system factors.
The model does not measure biological UC severity or predict deterioration, future admission, readmission, treatment response, or need for biologic therapy.
Validation is internal and limited to 2019 NEDS.
Calibration by risk range, confidence intervals, and complete subgroup analyses remain unfinished.
External EHR validation and prospective testing are required before clinical use.
ZIPINC_QRTL is an area-level socioeconomic proxy and does not measure individual household income.
HCUP ZIP-income thresholds vary by year; the app uses the documented 2019 thresholds.
The public ACS ZCTA lookup approximates the original NEDS variable, which used proprietary Claritas ZIP estimates.

zip_income_derivation.income_source: 2019 American Community Survey 5-year detailed table B19013 estimate B19013_E001
zip_income_derivation.threshold_source: HCUP NEDS Description of Data Elements: ZIPINC_QRTL
zip_income_derivation.method: Apply official 2019 HCUP dollar thresholds to valid 2019 ACS 5-year ZCTA median household income estimates.
zip_income_derivation.compatibility_note: Approximation only: NEDS ZIPINC_QRTL used Claritas ZIP-level estimates, while the local lookup uses public ACS ZCTA estimates. It may not reproduce the original NEDS category for every ZIP.

descriptive_probability_bands.basis: Provisional interface ranges; aggregate development prediction quantiles were unavailable and no cohort was rescored.
